Consumption"}], "description": "### Impact

An attacker who uses this vulnerability can craft a PDF which leads to large memory usage. This requires extracting text in layout mode with large character offsets.

### Patches

This has been fixed in [pypdf==6.12.0](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.12.0).

### Workarounds

If developers are unable to immediately upgrade, they should consider applying the changes from PR [#3790](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3790).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00127, "percentile": 0.0269}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cj93-chg6-vgv8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-12T18:29:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cj93-chg6-vgv8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cj93-chg6-vgv8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48155"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T16:16:28Z", "published_at": "2026-06-12T18:29:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/security/advisories/GHSA-cj93-chg6-vgv8", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48155", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3790", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.12.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cj93-chg6-vgv8"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/py-pdf/pypdf/security-advisories/GHSA-cj93-chg6-vgv8", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf", "summary": "pypdf: Possible large memory usage for large offsets for layout mode text", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T18:29:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cj93-chg6-vgv8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.12.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pypdf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.12.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pypdf: Possible large memory usage for large offsets for layout mode text
